description_long: This object is a beach chair and umbrella set placed on a sandy shore, with the ocean and sky in the background. The chair is positioned under a large, round, blue umbrella, providing shade from the sun. The chair itself appears to be a classic reclining beach lounger, likely made of lightweight metal or wood with a fabric seat. The umbrella is anchored in the sand, and both the chair and umbrella cast distinct shadows on the beach. The scene is visually dominated by the blue of the umbrella and the sea, contrasted with the tan sand and white surf. The overall impression is one of relaxation and leisure by the seaside.
description: A blue beach chair and umbrella set on sandy shore with ocean and sky in the background. The chair is shaded by the umbrella, evoking a relaxing seaside atmosphere.
description_view_0: A straight-on view of the ocean horizon with the beach chair and umbrella barely visible, mostly showing the sea and sky.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the blue umbrella and the chair beneath it, with the sandy beach and surf visible.
description_view_2: A frontal view of the beach chair and umbrella set, clearly showing both objects on the sand with the ocean behind.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, again showing the umbrella and chair, with the surf and sand in the foreground.
